ocr.text: In the table, the column headers are Province, PCI within 60 minutes n (% per province), and PCI within 120 minutes n (% per

minutes. The Western Cape shows 4.19 mil (71.9) within 60 minutes and 4.78 mil (82) within 120 minutes.
